items.title: Oosting traint met Antwerp op penalty's: 'Voor mij is het geen loterij'
items.summary: Joseph Oosting kan donderdag met Antwerp de finale van de Belgische beker bereiken. Anderlecht verslaan in het Bosuilstadion en hij is er, zijn eerste bekerfinale als hoofdtrainer. De keuzeheer laat dan ook niets aan het toeval over.

items.title: VI Live: Heerenveen op voorsprong tegen Go Ahead
items.summary: NEC heeft woensdagavond de kans om de tweede plek in de Eredivisie te grijpen. De Nijmegenaren moeten daarvoor minstens gelijkspelen thuis tegen FC Utrecht (aftrap 21.00 uur). Eerder op de avond staan Go Ahead Eagles en SC Heerenveen tegenover elkaar en ook Liverpool komt in actie. Je volgt het in de VI Live.

items.title: Leuven v Arsenal: Women’s Champions League – live

items.title: Ziedend oud-Feyenoord-talent dient klacht in na scheenbeenbreuk in België
items.summary: Amir Rais heeft een klacht ingediend bij de Belgische voetbalbond. De Nederlander, afgelopen zomer door Patro Eisden Maasmechelen overgenomen van Feyenoord, heeft een kuitbeenbreuk opgelopen. Hij is woest op zijn tegenstander Kayden Pierre.

items.title: Cruijff over rigoureuze ingreep bij Jong Ajax: 'Heb mijn excuses aangeboden'
items.summary: In een uitgebreid interview op VI PRO gaat Jordi Cruijff woensdagmiddag onder meer in op zijn rigoureuze ingreep bij Jong Ajax. Trainer Willem Weijs werd daar op non-actief gesteld, waarna Cruijff met Oscar García direct een vervanger presenteerde.

items.title: Tottenham job proved too big for Frank, but changing manager won't fix mess at club
items.summary: Thomas Frank took over at Tottenham after they won the Europa League. Now he's been fired with the club close to relegation. Here's how it went wrong.

items.title: Who are the candidates to replace Frank as Tottenham coach?
items.summary: With Thomas Frank out at Tottenham, which coaches might be in the frame to take over?

items.title: Van den Hurk jaar langer door bij Roda, PEC beloont Velanas
items.summary: Blijf via dit blog op de hoogte van alle transfers en transfergeruchten bij en rond clubs in de Eredivisie en de Keuken Kampioen Divisie. Bekijk hier ons blog voor de transferperikelen in het buitenland .

items.title: Eni Aluko damages her legacy with her latest attack on Ian Wright
items.summary: The former England international is a pioneer in football and the media. But her broadside on TV punditry is another own goal, empowering the most chauvinistic commentators Is this what Eni Aluko envisioned? Did she think reigniting the somewhat one-sided row between herself and fellow pundit Ian Wright would resurrect her broadcasting career or make Wright reflect differently on the incident that she triggered 10 months ago? If so, the exercise has failed and we sit staring at an overwhelmingly sad and depressing episode that is showing no sign of quieting down. No one credible would dispute Aluko’s record as a player. Her 105 caps and 33 goals for England, involvement in five major international tournaments, four FA Cup wins, three WSL titles and Serie A and Coppa Italia medals speak for themselves. Continue reading...

England men cricket results and fixtures 2026, including T20 World Cup
items.summary: Full fixtures for England's men's side in 2026, including the T20 World Cup and home white-ball series against India.

items.title: England announce pre-World Cup friendlies as training base confirmed
items.summary: England have announced pre-World Cup friendlies against New Zealand and Costa Rica in south Florida before the start of the tournament - and will be based in Kansas City, Missouri throughout their campaign.

items.title: England to play New Zealand and Costa Rica in final World Cup warm-ups
items.summary: England will complete their World Cup preparations with matches against New Zealand and Costa Rica in Florida in June, before travelling to their base in Kansas City.

items.title: Foden and Dias start for Man City vs Fulham LIVE!
ICE will be 'key part of security' at World Cup in US
items.summary: The acting head of US Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) has told a congressional committee that the agency is "a key part of the overall security apparatus for the World Cup" when asked if he would pause operations for this summer's tournament.

items.title: Madrid, UEFA reach deal, end Super League suits
items.summary: UEFA, European Club Football Association (EFC), and Real Madrid have reached a deal to end all legal disputes related to the Super League, UEFA and Real Madrid said on Wednesday.

items.title: Tottenham sack Frank after 8 months in charge
items.summary: Thomas Frank has been sacked as Tottenham head coach, the club confirmed Wednesday.

items.title: Wrexham boss welcomes Mac's 'job for life' claim
items.summary: Wrexham boss Phil Parkinson has welcomed co-owner Rob McElhenney's suggestion that he has the job for life, revelling in his role in the club's "fantastic story".

items.title: Shevchenko plans to tell Infantino face-to-face that Russia’s football ban must stand
items.summary: Ukrainian FA president seeks meeting on Thursday Fifa president due at Uefa congress in Brussels Andriy Shevchenko will seek a meeting with Gianni Infantino on Thursday to discuss the Fifa president’s recent comments that favoured Russia’s return to international football competitions. Infantino sparked condemnation in Ukraine when, speaking in an interview last week, he said the ban on Russia’s participation should be reassessed. Shevchenko, the Ukrainian Association of Football president, is looking to restate Ukraine’s position in private when the pair attend Uefa’s congress in Brussels. Continue reading...
